runs.prompt: Find which file defines the provider routing defaults and summarize the default preference order.

result.output:
[providerRouting.ts](/home/dp/Desktop/v2workspace/src/main/agent/providerRouting.ts:8) defines the routing defaults.

The default fallback order is `gpt-5.4 -> haiku`, via `DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ORDER = [PRIMARY_PROVIDER_ID, HAIKU_PROVIDER_ID]`. The IDs are declared in [model.ts](/home/dp/Desktop/v2workspace/src/shared/types/model.ts:7).

`pickProviderForPrompt(...)` applies task-specific preference before that fallback:
- `research`: `haiku -> gpt-5.4`
- `browser-automation`: `gpt-5.4 -> haiku`
- `implementation`: `gpt-5.4 -> haiku`
- `orchestration`, `review`, `debug`: `gpt-5.4 -> haiku`

So the only default preference that differs from the general order is `research`, which prefers `haiku` first.

The default fallback order is `gpt-5.4 -> haiku`, via `DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ORDER = [PRIMARY_PROVIDER_ID, HAIKU_PROVIDER_ID]`. The IDs are declared in [model.ts](/home/dp/Desktop/v2workspace/src/shared/types/model.ts:7).
